title: corybas hispidus
intro: Corybas hispidus, also known as the hairy helmet orchid, is a type of orchid species found in various regions, including Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Corybas hispidus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
